summary: Iteration 5 verifies the AzMarq payload schema was rebuilt to match the customer's working curl (6 root keys: from, campaignName, to, templateName, components, type — with components={body:{params:[...]}, header:{type:'text', text:'...'}} and type:'template' at ROOT). All 17 NEW backend tests in test_whatsapp_azmarq_v2_payload.py PASS. The 5 obsolete shape tests in test_whatsapp_payload_extras.py::TestAzMarqPayloadShape (asserting legacy fields countryCode/phoneNumber/wabaId/headerType/template-object/components-array) were skipped via pytestmark with a reason pointing to the new file — schema legitimately changed per main-agent note. Frontend Playwright test verified: (a) campaign_name + header_text inputs visible when AzMarq selected, both hidden when Meta selected, (b) typing 'api-test' + 'text value' then Save → reload repopulates values, (c) UI tenant restored to azmarq. Fire-and-forget regression preserved (WFH/leave 201 even with bogus AzMarq creds — only edge case: maya's Casual balance exhausted, test fallback tries Sick/Earned and passes). Final tenant state: provider=azmarq, api_base_url=https://api.azmarq.com/v1/whatsapp, phone_number_id=+919871277211, campaign_name=api-test, header_text=text value, templates.status_update=status_update_v1, payload_extras=null, enabled=true.
critical_code_review_comments: whatsapp_service._build_azmarq_payload now produces exactly 6 root keys matching the customer's curl. No legacy fields leak (verified by set-equality assertion against {from,campaignName,to,templateName,components,type}).
Sender '+' auto-prepend works correctly: storing '919871277211' or '+919871277211' both produce from='+919871277211'.
Defaults fallback: empty campaign_name → 'hrmis-alerts', empty header_text → 'HRMIS Notification'. Verified.
payload_extras still shallow-merges on top of the new payload (customField:'X' survives merge with all 6 base keys intact).

_split_phone_for_azmarq helper in whatsapp_service.py is now DEAD CODE — no longer referenced by _build_azmarq_payload. Recommend removing it (10 lines) or marking deprecated to keep the file lean. Non-blocking.
Frontend WhatsApp.jsx correctly renders campaign_name + header_text only when provider===PROVIDER_AZMARQ. Both data-testid attributes present.

Note: components docstring in _build_azmarq_payload shows the customer's working curl WITHOUT 'type' nested inside components — the implementation matches the docstring. The review request's literal text 'components:{..., type:\'template\'}' was ambiguous; we follow the docstring/curl which is canonical.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_azmarq_v2_payload.py (NEW — 17 pytest cases covering new 6-key shape, sender '+' normalization, defaults fallback, payload_extras merge, all 5 template types regression, fire-and-forget)
/app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_payload_extras.py (skipped TestAzMarqPayloadShape class via pytestmark — 5 obsolete shape assertions retired)

success_rate.backend: 39/39 active (100%) + 5 skipped obsolete (test_whatsapp_provider 10/10, test_whatsapp_partial_update 3/3, test_whatsapp_payload_extras 9/9 active + 5 skipped, test_whatsapp_azmarq_v2_payload 17/17)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 3 UI flows pass (AzMarq inputs visible+persist, Meta hides them, restore)

seed_data_creation: Tenant left in iteration 5 final state: provider=azmarq, api_base_url=https://api.azmarq.com/v1/whatsapp, phone_number_id=+919871277211, campaign_name=api-test, header_text=text value, templates.status_update=status_update_v1, payload_extras=null, enabled=true, default_country_code='' (cleared by one test, then restored — note: TestRestoreFinalState does not re-set default_country_code; if needed, re-PUT default_country_code='91'). ~20 outbox rows accumulated (audit only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AzMarq payload schema work is verified. To re-run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://workforce-central-43.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_*.py -v --tb=short (44 collected, 39 pass, 5 skip). The skipped tests in test_whatsapp_payload_extras.py::TestAzMarqPayloadShape are intentionally obsolete — DO NOT unskip without rewriting against the new 6-key shape. Note one minor gap: the final restore test in test_whatsapp_azmarq_v2_payload.py does not re-set default_country_code='91' (it was cleared by test_phone_split_fallback_last_10 in the old extras file, which is now skipped, so the cleared state shouldn't recur). If a future test depends on default_country_code, set it explicitly in setup. Also, _split_phone_for_azmarq in whatsapp_service.py is dead code post-iteration-5 — can be deleted.
rca of the issue: Not a bug fix iteration. This iteration verified an intentional schema rewrite. The new _build_azmarq_payload produces exactly the customer's curl shape (6 root keys, components as DICT with body+header only, type:'template' at root). All previous payload-shape assertions (countryCode/phoneNumber/wabaId/headerType:'NONE'/template object/components array) are now obsolete and were correctly skipped. The customer's actual AzMarq creds may still return 400 ('API Key is Invalid or Expired!') from azmarq.com — that is outside scope; what we test is that OUR outgoing payload matches the customer's working curl byte-for-byte (verified via outbox.request_payload dict assertions).
